LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Test.Ֆ_.Maybe:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Maybe
    type variables:  [a]
      constructors:
        nothing (0 arg(s))
        just (1 arg(s))
          _ : @0

Test.fromMaybe:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [a]
    type: □ → @0 → Test.Ֆ_.Maybe{0} @0 → @0
    body: λ _ _ →
            λ _ _ _ →
              case<Test.Ֆ_.Maybe{0},0> @0 of
                λ<[]> @1
                λ<[_]> @0
              @1
              @0

Test.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Test.fromMaybe □ Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
            (Test.Ֆ_.Maybe{0}{1}
               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}

Test.Bool:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Bool
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        r#true (0 arg(s))
        r#false (0 arg(s))

Test.notՖ27Ֆ:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Test.Bool{0}) → Test.Bool{0}
    body: λ _ →
            case<Test.Bool{0},0> @0 of
              λ<[]> Test.Bool{0}{1}
              λ<[]> Test.Bool{0}{0}

Test.not:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Test.Bool{0}) → Test.Bool{0}
    body: λ _ →
            case<Test.Bool{0},0> @0 of
              λ<[]> Test.Bool{0}{1}
              λ<[]> Test.Bool{0}{0}
